query: What detailed fees are associated with each decision point in the NYISO generation interconnection process?
final_answer:
Based on my research of NYISO's interconnection process documents, I can provide you with detailed information about the fees associated with each decision point in the NYISO generation interconnection process under the new **Standard Interconnection Procedures (SIP)** established in OATT Attachment HH (effective May 2, 2024). ## NYISO Generation Interconnection Process - Detailed Fee Structure ### Overview NYISO has transitioned from a serial "first-come, first-served" process to a **two-phase Cluster Study Process** that incorporates "first-ready, first-served" principles. The process includes multiple decision points with associated fees, deposits, and withdrawal penalties. --- ### Phase 1: Pre-Application Process (Optional) | Fee Type | Amount | Details | |----------|--------|---------| | **Pre-Application Fee** | **$5,000 per Point of Interconnection (POI)** | • Rolling, optional process
• 25% allocated to NYISO, 75% to Connecting TO/Affected TOs
• Maximum 2 POIs per request
• Provides heatmap data and preliminary feasibility information | --- ### Phase 2: Application Window | Fee Type | Amount | Details | |----------|--------|---------| | **Application Fee** | **$10,000** (non-refundable) | • $5,000 for CRIS-only projects
• 75% to NYISO, 25% to Connecting TO/Affected TOs
• Due with Interconnection Request submission
• Cash only | | **Study Deposit** | **$100,000 - $250,000** (scales with project size) | • Minimum $100,000 for projects under 80 MW
• $250,000 for larger projects
• Can be paid via cash, Letter of Credit, or surety bond
• Refundable (subject to reconciliation for actual study costs)
• Covers Phase 1 and Phase 2 study costs | **Application Window Duration:** - Standard Cluster Study: 45 Calendar Days - Transition Cluster Study: 75 Calendar Days --- ### Phase 3: Customer Engagement Window | Fee Type | Amount | Details | |----------|--------|---------| | **No additional fee** | N/A | • 70 Calendar Days (90 for Transition Cluster)
• Physical infeasibility screening occurs
• Projects deemed physically infeasible may withdraw without penalty | --- ### Phase 4: Phase 1 Entry Decision Point | Fee Type | Amount | Details | |----------|--------|---------| | **Readiness Deposit 1 (RD1)** | **$4,000/MW** | • Due to proceed to Phase 1 Study
• 5 Business Day decision period
• Applied toward future upgrade costs | **Withdrawal Penalty if project withdraws after this point:** **WP1 = 25% of RD1** --- ### Phase 5: Cluster Study Phase 1 (180 days) **Study Focus:** Local System Upgrade Facilities (SUF) and Connecting Transmission Owner's Attachment Facilities (CTOAF) identification and cost estimates | Fee Type | Amount | Details | |----------|--------|---------| | **Study costs** | Deducted from Study Deposit | • Invoiced monthly
• Reconciled against Study Deposit | --- ### Phase 6: Phase 2 Entry Decision Point | Fee Type | Amount | Details | |----------|--------|---------| | **Readiness Deposit 2 (RD2)** | **Greater of:**
• RD1 amount, **OR**
• **20% of cost estimate** from Phase 1 for Local SUF and CTOAF | • 10 Business Day decision period (1 round)
• Demonstrates commercial readiness to proceed | **Withdrawal Penalty if project withdraws after this point:** **WP2 = 25% of RD2** --- ### Phase 7: Cluster Study Phase 2 (Completes study process) **Study Focus:** System Deliverability Upgrades (SDU) and remaining analyses | Fee Type | Amount | Details | |----------|--------|---------| | **Study costs** | Deducted from Study Deposit | • Continued invoicing from Phase 1
• Final reconciliation at study completion | --- ### Phase 8: Final Cost Allocation Decision Point | Fee Type | Amount | Details | |----------|--------|---------| | **Security Deposit** | **100% of cost estimate** for SUFs, SDUs, and CTOAFs identified in Phase 1 and Phase 2 | • Required to accept Project Cost Allocation
• Must pay cash or post Security
• Failure to post = withdrawal from Queue | **Withdrawal Penalty if project withdraws after this point:** **WP3 = Forfeiture of Security** --- ### Summary Table: Decision Points and Associated Fees | Decision Point | Fee/Deposit Required | Amount | Withdrawal Penalty | |----------------|---------------------|--------|-------------------| | **Pre-Application** | Pre-Application Fee | $5,000/POI | None | | **Application Submission** | Application Fee + Study Deposit | $10,000 + $100K-$250K | None (if withdraw during Application Window or within 5 Business Days of cluster member list publication) | | **Phase 1 Entry** | Readiness Deposit 1 (RD1) | $4,000/MW | 25% of RD1 | | **Phase 2 Entry** | Readiness Deposit 2 (RD2) | Greater of RD1 or 20% of Phase 1 cost estimate | 25% of RD2 | | **Final Cost Acceptance** | Security Deposit | 100% of estimated upgrade costs | Forfeiture of Security | --- ### Additional Fee Provisions **CRIS-Only Projects:** - Application Fee: **$5,000** (instead of $10,000) - Study Deposit: **$50,000** (instead of $100,000-$250,000) **Modification Requests:** - Facility Modification Request deposit: **$10,000** (except for COD extensions or name changes) **Withdrawal Penalty Distribution:** - Withdrawal penalties are distributed to remaining Cluster Study participants to offset their upgrade costs --- ### Key Changes from Prior Process The new Standard Interconnection Procedures represent the most substantial enhancements to NYISO's interconnection process in two decades, including: 1. **Higher financial commitments** - Study deposits increased from $30,000 (old Feasibility Study deposit) to $100,000-$250,000 2. **Commercial Readiness Deposits** - New requirement at Phase 1 and Phase 2 entry decision points 3. **Withdrawal Penalties** - New penalties for late-stage withdrawals (previously none existed) 4. **Physical Infeasibility Screen** - Early screening allows penalty-free withdrawal for physically infeasible projects 5. **Consolidated Process** - Small and large generator procedures now combined in Attachment HH --- ### Sources This information is compiled from: - NYISO OATT Attachment HH (Standard Interconnection Procedures), effective May 2, 2024 - NYISO Interconnection Order No. 2023 Compliance Plan presentations (December 2023, January-February 2024) - Technical Bulletin 262 (Transition Cluster Study Process) - NYISO Standard Interconnection Procedures FAQ (February 2025)
